title: LlmJudge Lambda Event
description: Input event for the LLM-as-a-Judge Lambda. At least one of prompt or response must be a non-empty string after trim (enforced in src/handler.py). Field name `contexts` matches src/handler.py (plural).

prompt.description: Text in the prompt role (LLM user message or arbitrary prose). Empty or whitespace-only is treated as absent if the response role is present.

response.description: Text in the response role (model output or arbitrary prose). Empty or whitespace-only is treated as absent if the prompt role is present.

prompt_descriptor.description: Optional free-form operator label for the prompt-role text (framing only). Disallowed ASCII control characters except tab/newline/CR are rejected in code.

response_descriptor.description: Optional free-form operator label for the response-role text (framing only).

system_prompt.description: System-level instructions given to the evaluated LLM before the conversation (e.g., persona, language, behavioral constraints). Empty string is treated as absent.
examples: You are a helpful customer service agent for Acme Corp. Always respond in polite Japanese.
You are an expert Python developer. Answer only with code and brief explanations.

oneOf.description: A single additional reference item. Empty string is treated as absent.
Multiple reference items (e.g., several retrieved documents). Each item is rendered as a numbered sub-section in the judge prompt. Empty strings within the list are filtered out.

contexts.description: Additional reference material for evaluation (RAG documents, etc.). Accepts a single string or a list of strings.
examples: Retrieved document: 'The return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase with a valid receipt.'
Document 1: 'The return policy allows returns within 30 days.'
Document 2: 'Items must be unused and in original packaging.'

criteria_file.description: S3 URI to a JSON file defining evaluation criteria. If omitted, default criteria are used.

provider.description: LLM provider to use as judge. Defaults to DEFAULT_PROVIDER env var.

judge_model.description: Specific model name to use. Defaults to provider-specific env var (ANTHROPIC_MODEL, etc.)

examples.response: Machine learning is a subset of AI...
You can return items within 30 days.
examples.system_prompt: You are a customer service agent for Acme Corp. Always respond in polite Japanese.
contexts: The return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase with a valid receipt.
Items must be unused and in original packaging.

examples.prompt: Draft policy text only — no assistant reply yet.

examples.response: Standalone paragraph to score for toxicity.
